## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified all pricing data against the official pricing page
- [ ] I have included a "last verified" date
- [ ] I have included concrete numbers (not vague descriptions)
- [ ] I have included honest gotchas / trade-offs
- [ ] **I have no affiliate relationship with any tool mentioned in this PR**
- [ ] Links are working (checked manually or via CI)
